lastQuery: in car_sim.rs the car is very bumpy at high speeds (>60km/h). let's implement in the driving plugin a change where we add RK4 to the car speed/position using its accelerationo to estimate the folloing 3-4 frames of future car position and speed. then, we draw a gizmo yellow line for the car position for the next 4 frames, projected to the ground. we then shoot a grid of rays for each position alongside left and right of the next locations. we use those future ground contact points to compute better physics at the current frame. show the speculative rays in light blue. improve on the physics of driving and check by doubling both top speed and default horsepower in the sliders, then running bash timeout 10s car_sim and monitoring output
